purpose: Shared contract for every Wizard101 fact record. Dataset-specific required fields are declared in data/wizard101/catalog_manifest.json.

required_common_fields.id: Stable internal id, namespaced by dataset when possible.
required_common_fields.name: Canonical in-game/wiki name.
required_common_fields.source: Source metadata with at least a URL or local source id and retrieval date.
required_common_fields.verification: Verification object with a level from catalog_manifest.json and reviewer/source details.

verification_levels.unverified: Imported but not trusted for automation decisions.
verification_levels.source-linked: Has a source link but exact facts are not fully checked.
verification_levels.exact-page-verified: Facts were verified against exact source pages and may be used for constraints/warnings.
verification_levels.strategy-reviewed: Facts were reviewed for automation strategy and may drive recommendations.
